_note: Hand-authored sample in ChordMini's response shape. Drives the play-along UI before the backend exists and is the input to the fromChordMini mapper test. Lyrics are 'Amazing Grace' (public domain). Chords include frame-level repeats (to exercise collapse), a 7th, a slash-degree (G:maj/3 -> G/B), and an N no-chord span.

synchronized_lyrics.text: Amazing grace, how sweet the sound
That saved a wretch like me
I once was lost, but now am found
Was blind, but now I see
